cost_latency_intuition: Milliseconds to seconds; low direct cost but high model-risk exposure
sample_budget: Thousands to millions of candidate checks
what_can_reject: Obvious invalidity dominated regions sensitivity failures or proxy-calibration failures
method_implication: Use for pruning active learning and broad search not final commitment

cost_latency_intuition: Seconds to hours depending on capture replay and privacy filtering
sample_budget: Tens to thousands of slices or scenarios
what_can_reject: Coverage gaps stale workload versions leakage or mismatch to intended deployment
method_implication: Use for workload state clustering and targeted tests

cost_latency_intuition: Minutes to days depending on model detail and target workload
sample_budget: Tens to hundreds of scoped architecture comparisons
what_can_reject: Simulator configuration errors unsupported states calibration gaps and sensitivity checks
method_implication: Use staged design-space exploration with replay and escalation

cost_latency_intuition: Seconds to hours depending on build profiling and target availability
sample_budget: Many local measurements fewer portable claims
what_can_reject: Correctness tests portability checks and end-to-end software-path evidence
method_implication: Use autotuning or generation only with tests and provenance attached

cost_latency_intuition: Hours to days when timing power congestion or signoff constraints enter
sample_budget: Handfuls to tens of scarce high-fidelity samples
what_can_reject: Timing power area congestion DRC formal or waived-warning review
method_implication: Use filters surrogates and human gates before spending samples

cost_latency_intuition: High setup cost; weeks to years when field evidence or silicon commitment is required
sample_budget: Few high-commitment measurements plus ongoing telemetry
what_can_reject: Field behavior reliability rollback policy incident review and a named human decision owner
method_implication: Use for calibration validation and drift monitoring not blind exploration
